instructions.instruction: Use map to transform a collection instead of a manual index loop
instructions.relevant_when: Transforming every element of a collection

instructions.instruction: Use filter with a predicate to select elements instead of push-in-a-loop
instructions.relevant_when: Selecting a subset of a collection

instructions.instruction: Use reduce to aggregate a collection into a single value
instructions.relevant_when: Summing, grouping, or folding a collection

instructions.instruction: Compose small single-purpose functions instead of one monolithic function
